languages.text: Сам Зарков становится миром, о существовании которого многие знают лишь по слухам. Страшное место из легенд, загадочная планета беззакония, хладного торга и тайны. Посвященные легко находят, где искать источник легенды — для остальных же планета остается всего лишь байкой, случайно услышанной на улицах Футфола.

The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.
languages.original_text: Сам Зарков становится миром, о существовании которого многие знают лишь по слухам. Страшное место из легенд, загадочная планета беззакония, хладного торга и тайны. Посвященные легко находят, где искать источник легенды — для остальных же планета остается всего лишь байкой, случайно услышанной на улицах Футфола.

traits.locale_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

languages.text: ザルコフの存在は、事実よりも噂話に過ぎなくなっていた。伝説の恐ろしい世界、法の支配されない謎めいた惑星、コールド・トレード、そして秘密。噂を知る者たちは、その話を聞いた場所を容易に追跡できたが、そうでない者たちにとっては、ザルコフは足フォール街で耳にした話以上のものにはならなかった。
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの存在は、事実よりも噂話に過ぎなくなっていた。伝説の恐ろしい世界、法の支配されない謎めいた惑星、コールド・トレード、そして秘密。噂を知る者たちは、その話を聞いた場所を容易に追跡できたが、そうでない者たちにとっては、ザルコフは足フォール街で耳にした話以上のものにはならなかった。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的存在，渐渐变得愈发像是传闻。传说中那是个可怕的行星，是法外之地，充斥着冷市贸易和秘密。知晓内情的人自然能轻易找到那些传闻的源头，但对其他人而言，这颗行星不过是在落脚港街头偶然听到的奇闻故事罢了。
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫的存在，渐渐变得愈发像是传闻。传说中那是个可怕的行星，是法外之地，充斥着冷市贸易和秘密。知晓内情的人自然能轻易找到那些传闻的源头，但对其他人而言，这颗行星不过是在落脚港街头偶然听到的奇闻故事罢了。

languages.text: L'existence même de Zarkov fut reléguée à l'état de rumeur. On en parlait comme d'un monde terrifiant tiré de légendes, une mystérieuse planète où régnaient l'anarchie, le Commerce Froid et les secrets. La source de ces récits était à la portée des individus bien informés, mais pour le commun des mortels, Zarkov resta un simple mythe transmis de bouche à oreille dans les rues de Castel.
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

On en parlait comme d'un monde terrifiant tiré de légendes, une mystérieuse planète où régnaient l'anarchie, le Commerce Froid et les secrets. La source de ces récits était à la portée des individus bien informés, mais pour le commun des mortels, Zarkov resta un simple mythe transmis de bouche à oreille dans les rues de Castel.

languages.text: La mera existencia de Zarkov se convirtió en un rumor, más que un hecho. Un mundo aterrador de leyenda, un misterioso planeta sin ley, Comercio Frío y secretos. Los entendidos podían dar con el origen de las historias sin problema, pero, para los demás, el planeta no era más que una anécdota comentada por las calles de Paso.
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

traits.locale_text: La mera existencia de Zarkov se convirtió en un rumor, más que un hecho. Un mundo aterrador de leyenda, un misterioso planeta sin ley, Comercio Frío y secretos. Los entendidos podían dar con el origen de las historias sin problema, pero, para los demás, el planeta no era más que una anécdota comentada por las calles de Paso.

languages.text: Zarkov'un varlığı bir gerçekten ziyade söylenti olmakla kaldı. Efsanelerden fırlama korkunç bir dünya; kanunsuzluğun, Soğuk Ticaret'in ve sırların gizemli gezegeni. Bilenler, hikâyelerin kaynağının izini kolayca sürebilirdi. Kalanlar içinse gezegen, Binliman sokaklarında kulak misafiri olunan bir hikâyeden ibaretti.
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un varlığı bir gerçekten ziyade söylenti olmakla kaldı. Efsanelerden fırlama korkunç bir dünya; kanunsuzluğun, Soğuk Ticaret'in ve sırların gizemli gezegeni. Bilenler, hikâyelerin kaynağının izini kolayca sürebilirdi. Kalanlar içinse gezegen, Binliman sokaklarında kulak misafiri olunan bir hikâyeden ibaretti.

languages.text: Die Existenz von Zarkov war eher ein Gerücht, denn eine Tatsache. Eine Furcht erregende Welt aus Legenden, ein geheimnisumwobener Hort der Gesetzlosigkeit und des Kalthandels. Wer eingeweiht war, konnte den Ursprung der Geschichten leicht ermitteln ... für alle anderen blieb der Planet allerdings ein in den Straßen von Footfall kursierendes Gerücht.
languages.original_text: The very existence of Zarkov became more rumour than fact. A terrifying world from legend, a mysterious planet of lawlessness, Cold Trade, and secrets. Those in the know could easily track down the source of the tales — but for the rest, the planet remained nothing more than a story overheard on the streets of Footfall.
